SCHEDULE

Training Schedules by Dojo & Class

Practice schedules for each area, centered on Sapporo. If training is cancelled at short notice (heavy snow, illness outbreaks, etc.), a notice is posted on the bulletin board. Room capacity may be limited, so if you wish to visit another branch for practice, please confirm through your branch chief in advance. Classes are cancelled when schools close due to influenza or similar.

Sapporo

  • Shiroishi Ward
  • Atsubetsu Ward
  • Chuo Ward
  • Toyohira Ward
  • Kiyota Ward
  • Higashi Ward
  • Kita Ward
  • Minami Ward
  • ★HQ General Class★
  • ★Events★
  • ☆Sapporo Iaido☆
  • ★Special Class★
  • ★Women-only Class★

Shizuoka & Fukuoka

  • Reserve 2

Ebetsu / Iwamizawa / Ishikari (Hanakawa)

  • Ebetsu City
  • Iwamizawa City
  • Ishikari City

Eniwa (Shimamatsu) / Obihiro

  • Obihiro City
  • Eniwa City

Tobetsu / Naganuma / Kimobetsu / Kyogoku

  • Tobetsu Town
  • Naganuma Town
  • Kimobetsu Town
  • Kyogoku Town

Seishinkai

NPO All Japan Seishinkai Karate Federation

  • 2-1-27 Sakaedori, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo
  • TEL 011-300-0048（Mon–Fri 13:00–16:00）
  • FAX 011-300-0094
  • Karate@seishinkan.ne.jp
